---
  title: "Module I"
---

# Overview

This module equips participants with the knowledge and practical skills needed to collect, manage,
and analyze data effectively using digital tools. Covers the entire data lifecycle, from planning and
collection to storage, processing, and reporting, while emphasizing data quality, security, and ethical
standards. Participants will gain hands-on experience with modern platforms such as Google
Forms, Kobo Toolbox, and Microsoft Excel, enabling them to design digital data collection
tools, conduct mobile-based field surveys, and perform basic to advanced data analysis for informed
decision-making



## Topics

### Public Health Data Systems

- Surveillance systems
- Data pipelines
- Reporting structures

### Digital Data Collection

- KoboToolbox
- REDCap
- ODK

### Data Quality

- Completeness
- Consistency
- Timeliness
- Accuracy

### Dashboard Development

- Monitoring indicators
- Interactive reporting

## Practical Sessions

- KoboToolbox project development
- REDCap implementation
- Dashboard creation
